description: Computes limits using Richardson extrapolation for numeric evaluation
utility: Calculate limits: lim_(x→a) f(x) including one-sided limits and infinity

arguments.name: expression
arguments.description: Expression as quoted string containing the variable

arguments.name: variable
arguments.description: Variable name approaching the limit point

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: Value that variable approaches (can be Infinity or -Infinity)

alternates: AsciiMath syntax: lim_(x->a) expr → limit(expr, x, a)
Supports one-sided limits via context configuration
